name: Neural Networks
tagline: Parameterized function approximators built from layers of simple units
problem:
Many phenomena are nonlinear and high-dimensional: vision, language, control, and forecasting. Linear models can be too weak, and rule-based systems are brittle.

Neural networks approximate complex functions by composing simple nonlinear transformations. The challenge is training stability and generalization, not just expressive power.
overview:
A neural network maps inputs to outputs through layers: linear transforms plus nonlinear activations. Training adjusts parameters to minimize loss on data.

Architectures specialize: convolutional nets for images, recurrent nets for sequences, transformers for attention. The common backbone is differentiable composition trained by gradient methods.

principles.name: Universal approximation
principles.explanation: With sufficient capacity, networks can approximate many functions, but training and data constrain what is practical.

principles.name: Regularization
principles.explanation: Techniques like weight decay, dropout, and early stopping reduce overfitting.

principles.name: Initialization and normalization
principles.explanation: Good initialization and normalization stabilize gradients and speed learning.

rawMaterials.name: Electric power
rawMaterials.purpose: Energy for computation, storage, and networking
earthLocations: Electrical grids globally; generators in remote sites
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Solar + batteries is the simplest early-space pathway; plan for tight energy budgets and thermal rejection.
rawMaterials.processingRequired: Stable voltage regulation, grounding, and basic power-quality control.

rawMaterials.name: Semiconductor devices
rawMaterials.purpose: Transistors and ICs that perform switching, storage, and signal conditioning
earthLocations: Global semiconductor supply chains; packaged IC distributors
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Early colonies import packaged devices; long-term local manufacture requires clean chemistry and crystal growth capabilities.
rawMaterials.processingRequired: ESD-safe handling; correct packaging, heat sinking, and derating for temperature and radiation.

rawMaterials.name: Documentation and standards
rawMaterials.purpose: Make designs reproducible and debuggable across teams and time
earthLocations: Libraries, universities, standards bodies, archived web
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Mirror core references offline; maintain printed and digital copies with checksums and redundancy.
rawMaterials.processingRequired: Versioning, change control, and clear measurement units and assumptions.

rawMaterials.name: Labeled data
rawMaterials.purpose: Supervised learning signals for many tasks
earthLocations: Human annotation; sensors with ground truth
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Use simulation and self-supervision where labels are scarce; prioritize safe data generation.
rawMaterials.processingRequired: Label quality checks and bias audits.

buildSteps.title: Start with a baseline
buildSteps.description: Implement a small network and a simple baseline model; compare honestly.
buildSteps.warningNote: Skipping baselines hides whether the model helps.

buildSteps.title: Train with stable settings
buildSteps.description: Use reasonable learning rates, normalization, and regularization; log metrics.
buildSteps.warningNote: Instability can look like 'random bad luck' if you don't log.

buildSteps.title: Evaluate failure modes
buildSteps.description: Perform error analysis; check calibration and robustness to shifts.
buildSteps.warningNote: High average accuracy can hide catastrophic edge cases.

buildSteps.title: Scale only after correctness
buildSteps.description: Increase model size or data only after the pipeline is correct and measurable.

history.event: Early neural models and perceptrons proposed.
Deep learning becomes dominant in many perception tasks.

impact:
Neural networks enable flexible models that learn from data, impacting communication, science, and automation. They also introduce new failure modes: opacity, bias, and overconfidence.

In The Codex, neural networks are a prerequisite to modern AI but must be paired with rigorous evaluation and governance to be safe and useful.

images.caption: Input, hidden transforms, activations, output, loss

sources.title: LeCun et al. (1998) — Gradient-based learning applied to document recognition
